title: Prescription
doc_html:
§1455.  Prescription

No such suit shall be maintained unless commenced within two years after cancellation of, or failure to renew such franchise.  

Added by Acts 1974, No. 628, §1.

§1455.  Prescription

Added by Acts 1974, No. 628, §1.
